title: cynanchum × vernyi
intro: Cynanchum × vernyi, also known as Chinese bugbane or Chinese swallowwort, is a type of flowering plant native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's roots and stems are rich in compounds such as saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating rheumatism. Cynanchum × vernyi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for herbal use, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
